scripts.build: npm run build -w @misonos/sonos-protocol && npm run build -w @misonos/bridge && npm run build -w @misonos/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @misonos/sonos-protocol && npm run test -w @misonos/sonos-protocol && npm run test -w @misonos/bridge && npm run test -w @misonos/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @misonos/sonos-protocol && npm run typecheck -w @misonos/bridge && npm run typecheck -w @misonos/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @misonos/sonos-protocol && npm run lint -w @misonos/bridge && npm run lint -w @misonos/web
